title: Her Honor, the Governor
writer: Doris Anderson, Hyatt Daab, Weed Dickinson
actors: Pauline Frederick, Carroll Nye, Greta von Rue
plot: The only son of Gov. Adele Fenway, Bob, is engaged to Marian Lee, and at a dinner Adele announces her intention of giving them a wedding house. Having refused to support a water power bill endorsed by Jim Dornton, the political bo...
